sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n53185" key="kapnoba/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">καπνο-βάτης</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[βᾰ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, epith. of a pastoral people, dub. in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1866.tlg001:104J" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Posidon.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">104J.</biblScope> </bibl> </entryFree>
